indicators.name: no flat personal work surface
indicators.rationale: The absence of a flat surface at sitting height makes it impossible to set up a computer workstation.

indicators.name: upholstered sofa without desk
indicators.rationale: The sofa is not designed for computer work, as it lacks a surface for placing a laptop or keyboard.

indicators.name: high-traffic public lobby layout
indicators.rationale: The layout of the space is designed for public use, not for focused solo work, making it unsuitable for computer work.

indicators.name: ambient chandelier overhead lighting
indicators.rationale: Ambient lighting does not provide sufficient task illumination for screen work and may cause glare.

indicators.name: decorative plant arrangements
indicators.rationale: Decorative elements suggest this is a public space, not suitable for focused work.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is highly unsuitable for computer work (solo). The lack of a flat work surface, ergonomic seating, and a private layout make it impossible to set up a productive workstation. The ambient lighting and decorative elements further indicate that this is a public space, not suitable for focused solo work.
